sources.name: wikimedia_commons
sources.note: best for math/geometry/3D/science/anatomy; PD/CC0/CC-BY/CC-BY-SA per file; has API

sources.name: servier_smart
sources.note: CC BY 4.0 medical/anatomy (3000+). No clean public API -> disabled; browse, or find Servier uploads mirrored on Wikimedia Commons

sources.name: nih_bioart
sources.note: NIH biomedical art; browse. Disabled (no wired API)

sources.name: smithsonian_openaccess
sources.note: CC0; API at api.si.edu needs a free key. Disabled until key configured

sources.name: nasa_images
sources.note: public domain (US); API at images-api.nasa.gov. Disabled (not wired)
